name: arifOS MCP
description: Constitutional MCP gateway — arifOS + GEOX + WEALTH trinity. 13 public canonical tools, 13 floors, human veto.

tools.name: arifos_000_init
tools.description: Initialize constitutional session with identity binding and telemetry seed.

tools.name: arifos_111_sense
tools.description: Ground query in physical reality via constitutional sensing and intent classification.

tools.name: arifos_222_witness
tools.description: Reality verification and witness consensus, including hardened web_search degradation.

tools.name: arifos_333_mind
tools.description: Multi-source synthesis and structured first-principles reasoning with uncertainty bands.

tools.name: arifos_444_kernel
tools.description: Route request to the correct metabolic lane or tool family based on risk and task type.

tools.name: arifos_555_memory
tools.description: Retrieve governed memory and engineering context from configured storage backends.

tools.name: arifos_666_heart
tools.description: Red-team proposal for ethical risks and stakeholder safety.

tools.name: arifos_777_ops
tools.description: Calculate operation costs, thermodynamics, capacity, and timing with entropy analysis.

tools.name: arifos_888_judge
tools.description: Final constitutional verdict evaluation. Outputs: SEAL, PARTIAL, VOID, HOLD_888.

tools.name: arifos_999_vault
tools.description: Append and query immutable verdict records on the canonical Vault999 ledger.

tools.name: arifos_forge
tools.description: Issue signed execution manifests after SEAL verification, with dry-run simulation support.

tools.name: arifos_gateway
tools.description: Bridge governed interactions between metabolic organs.

tools.name: arifos_sabar
tools.description: Expose cooling and hold-state status for governance-safe pacing.
